calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for the Plaintiff Wells Fargo, N.A.
Ali Fantous, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s): Donald C. Gillette and Patricai Klimek.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept.304-B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for Entry of Future Judgment", which was filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
